# Scope — Unified Linux Package & Maintenance App

Scope is a Tauri desktop app for Linux package visibility, cleanup planning, and safe maintenance workflows.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://khurrambhutto.github.io/scope/) — Overview, features, download links, and FAQ for the Linux app manager.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/khurrambhutto/scope) — Source code, issues, and releases.
- [Releases](https://github.com/khurrambhutto/scope/releases) — Pre-built binaries for download.

## Key Information

- **License**: MIT
- **Language**: Rust
- **Platform**: Linux
- **Author**: Khurram Bhutto (https://khurrambhutto.tech/)
- **Features**: Multi-source package scanning, update visibility, cleanup planning, safe maintenance roadmap

## Installation

Use the Tauri app from source with `npm install` and `npm run tauri dev`.

## FAQ

**What is Scope?**
A desktop app that scans APT, Snap, Flatpak, and AppImage packages from one searchable view.

**Which package managers are supported?**
APT (Debian/Ubuntu), Snap, Flatpak, and AppImage.

**Is it free?**
Yes, MIT licensed open source software.
